Functional.question: How many job sites and warehouses are in scope today and over the next 12–24 months, and where are they located?
Functional.why_it_matters: Determines multi-site configuration, data partitioning, network considerations, and scale of rollout.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Underestimation of scope leading to performance issues and a rollout plan that does not fit growth.

Functional.question: Which inventory processes must be supported end-to-end (receiving, issues to job/cost code, transfers between sites, returns, adjustments, cycle counts, kitting/BOMs, staging/reservations)?
Functional.why_it_matters: Defines workflow design, permissions, and data model including reservations and WIP handling.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Gaps in operational coverage and rework to add missing flows later.

Functional.question: What are the offline requirements (duration expected offline, critical transactions offline, conflict resolution rules, sync frequency, size limits)?
Functional.why_it_matters: Drives the offline-first architecture, caching, and sync conflict handling design.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Field users blocked in low-connectivity areas; potential data loss or duplication.

Functional.question: Which mobile platforms and devices are approved (iOS/Android, versions) and what rugged scanners or camera-based scanning will be used?
Functional.why_it_matters: Impacts app delivery approach, SDKs for scanning, and device-specific optimization.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Incompatibilities with hardware and poor scanning performance in the field.

Functional.question: What barcode/QR standards and symbologies are required (e.g., GS1-128, Code 128, QR), and are there label printing needs (on-site printers, label sizes, templates)?
Functional.why_it_matters: Affects scanning accuracy, parsing logic (GS1 AIs), and label printing integrations.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Scanning errors and labeling bottlenecks that slow field operations.

Functional.question: Describe procurement workflows (requisition to PO, approvals and thresholds, min/max or reorder points, vendor catalogs/pricing, blanket POs, three-way match).
Functional.why_it_matters: Determines automation rules, approval routing, and integration points with ERP/AP.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Broken or manual procurement steps and compliance exposure.

Functional.question: What is the scope of supplier management (onboarding, compliance documents, lead times/MOQs, performance scorecards, contract management)?
Functional.why_it_matters: Defines required supplier data model and KPIs for vendor performance.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Limited visibility into supplier risk and performance; missed savings.

Functional.question: How do you allocate material costs (by job, phase, cost code, asset), and are there budget validations at issue time?
Functional.why_it_matters: Ensures correct posting rules and controls for cost management.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Misstated job costs and downstream accounting discrepancies.

Functional.question: Are lot/batch/serial tracking or expiration/shelf-life controls required for any materials?
Functional.why_it_matters: Impacts item master design, transaction capture, and valuation.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Inability to trace materials or comply with quality requirements.

Functional.question: Do you need photo/document attachments during transactions (e.g., receiving damages, wastage evidence, delivery dockets)?
Functional.why_it_matters: Affects storage, UX design, and mobile capabilities.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Lost evidence for disputes and weaker auditability.

Functional.question: Will the system operate across multiple business units or legal entities and currencies?
Functional.why_it_matters: Determines multi-entity configuration, data segregation, and financial controls.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Data leakage between entities and incorrect financial reporting.

Functional.question: What are the priority KPIs for dashboards (e.g., usage variance by job, wastage %, stockouts, supplier OTIF, forecast accuracy) and reporting cadence/export formats?
Functional.why_it_matters: Guides analytics design and selection of visualization components.
Functional.risk_if_unanswered: Dashboards that do not inform decisions or meet leadership needs.

Technical.question: Which ERP and accounting systems (name/version) are in scope, and what integration methods are available (APIs, iPaaS/middleware, SFTP/file exchange, EDI)?
Technical.why_it_matters: Determines integration architecture, effort, and error-handling approach.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Integration delays, unreliable sync, and manual workarounds.

Technical.question: What master and transactional data flows are required bi-directionally (items, suppliers, POs, receipts, issues, GL postings), and what is the required sync frequency/latency?
Technical.why_it_matters: Defines data contracts and ensures real-time visibility targets are met.

Technical.question: Preferred cloud provider/regions and any networking constraints (VPC peering, VPN, IP allowlists, PrivateLink)?
Technical.why_it_matters: Impacts deployment topology, security posture, and latency.

Technical.question: Do you require SSO/MFA and which IdP is used (Azure AD, Okta, Google, others)? Any SCIM provisioning needs?
Technical.why_it_matters: Affects authentication integration and user lifecycle management.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Weaker security and manual user management overhead.

Technical.question: What are the performance and availability targets (peak concurrent users, transactions per minute, response time SLAs, uptime %, RTO/RPO, DR requirements)?
Technical.why_it_matters: Sets non-functional benchmarks and capacity planning.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: System instability under load and extended outages.

Technical.question: What is the environment strategy (dev/test/stage/prod) and CI/CD expectations for releases?
Technical.why_it_matters: Determines delivery pipeline and change risk controls.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Release bottlenecks or production incidents due to weak controls.

Technical.question: Are there mobile device management (MDM) policies, minimum OS versions, and app distribution constraints?
Technical.why_it_matters: Impacts mobile deployment, updates, and security controls.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Inconsistent app availability and security gaps on devices.

Technical.question: What label printing technologies are in use (Zebra/ZPL, Bluetooth/Wi-Fi printers), and do you require on-device printing from mobile?
Technical.why_it_matters: Guides print service integrations and drivers.
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Inability to print labels at point of use.

Technical.question: Do you require telemetry/logging integration with your SIEM (Splunk, Sentinel) and specific audit export formats?
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Limited visibility into incidents and compliance gaps.

Technical.question: Any requirements for IoT/RFID/BLE tracking for high-value assets or materials in the future?
Technical.risk_if_unanswered: Retrofitting costs if advanced tracking is later required.

Design_UX.question: Who are the primary personas (warehouse clerk, site foreman, project manager, buyer) and their top 3 tasks per persona?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Enables persona-driven flows and minimizes clicks for frequent tasks.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Cluttered UX that slows adoption and increases training needs.

Design_UX.question: What are the scanning ergonomics needs (glove use, outdoor/bright sun, one-hand operation, large buttons, haptic feedback)?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Optimizes mobile UI for field conditions and safety.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: User frustration and slow transactions in the field.

Design_UX.question: How should offline state and sync conflicts be presented to users (indicators, queue view, manual vs auto-resolve)?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Improves trust in offline mode and reduces errors.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Hidden data conflicts and loss of user confidence.

Design_UX.question: Any localization needs (languages, units of measure, date/time formats, currencies) across sites?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Ensures usability and compliance across regions.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Misinterpretation of data and training complexity.

Design_UX.question: What dashboard KPIs and drilldowns are most used by PMs and executives? Do you prefer in-app analytics or export to BI tools (Power BI/Tableau)?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Prioritizes design of role-based dashboards and integrations.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Dashboards that do not drive action or require manual exports.

Design_UX.question: Do you need photo capture, annotations, or e-signatures in the mobile flows (e.g., receiving, handover)?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Affects mobile permissions, storage, and UI components.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Missed proof of delivery and dispute resolution features.

Design_UX.question: What training approach is preferred (train-the-trainer, microlearning in app, video SOPs) and expected time-to-proficiency for each persona?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Informs enablement content and rollout success.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Extended ramp-up time and resistance to change.

Design_UX.question: Do you require accessibility standards (WCAG) and safety considerations for on-site use?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Ensures inclusivity and reduces risk in field conditions.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Excludes some users and increases incident risk.

Design_UX.question: Is on-site label printing from mobile flows required (e.g., putaway, repack, returns), and where should those actions appear in the UI?
Design_UX.why_it_matters: Impacts flow design and device/printer pairing UX.
Design_UX.risk_if_unanswered: Extra steps outside the app reduce efficiency.

Data.question: What is the scope and quality of current data for migration (item master, suppliers, on-hand balances, open POs), and who owns data cleansing?
Data.why_it_matters: Determines migration effort, cleansing plan, and responsibilities.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Inaccurate starting balances and extended reconciliation.

Data.question: What item master attributes are required (UoM and conversions, categories, alternates/substitutes, kits/BOMs, hazardous flags, dimensions/weight)?
Data.why_it_matters: Defines schema and ensures operational suitability.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Insufficient item data for operations or analytics.

Data.question: How are storage locations modeled (warehouse, area, aisle, bin) and is bin-level tracking required at sites?
Data.why_it_matters: Affects inventory accuracy and picking/putaway efficiency.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Poor location accuracy and increased search time.

Data.question: Which stock states must be tracked (available, reserved, in-transit, damaged/QA hold, project-committed)?
Data.why_it_matters: Impacts availability logic and reservation rules.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Over-issuing or stockouts due to incorrect availability.

Data.question: What historical data is needed for reporting/forecasting (consumption by job, wastage reasons) and how many years back?
Data.why_it_matters: Enables forecasting models and baseline trend analysis.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Weak forecasting and limited continuous improvement.

Data.question: What supplier data is required (price lists, lead times, MOQs, performance metrics) and update frequency?
Data.why_it_matters: Supports procurement automation and vendor scorecards.
Data.risk_if_unanswered: Outdated pricing and unreliable replenishment plans.

Data.question: What are data retention and purge policies for transactions, attachments, and audit logs?
What are daily volumes (SKUs, transactions/day, concurrent mobile scans), and peak periods (seasonality, project phases)?
Do you require label data content standards (GS1 AIs, custom fields) and centralized template governance?
Data.why_it_matters: Ensures consistent labels and scanner parsing.

Security_Compliance.question: Which security/compliance frameworks are required (SOC 2, ISO 27001) and any data residency constraints?
Detail RBAC needs (roles by persona, site-level segregation, approval SoD), and privileged access controls.
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Informs role design and access policies.

Security_Compliance.question: Encryption requirements for data at rest/in transit and key management preferences (KMS, customer-managed keys).
Security_Compliance.risk_if_unanswered: Weak encryption posture and audit gaps.

Security_Compliance.question: Authentication/SSO/MFA policies, password rotation, and session timeout requirements.
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Secures access and aligns to corporate policy.

Security_Compliance.question: Logging/monitoring needs (SIEM integration, log retention, audit export format) and alerting thresholds.
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Supports incident response and compliance evidence.

Security_Compliance.question: Mobile security standards (device encryption, jailbreak/root detection, remote wipe, offline data protection).
Vulnerability management and pen testing cadence; expectations for remediation SLAs.
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Ensures continuous hardening of the solution.

Security_Compliance.question: Any specific audit trail export/report formats for regulators or internal audit?
Security_Compliance.why_it_matters: Shapes audit log schema and export capabilities.
Security_Compliance.risk_if_unanswered: Manual effort to produce audit artifacts.

Delivery_Governance.question: What is the desired implementation timeline, critical dates, and any dependencies with other projects?
What is the budget range and procurement process (RFP stages, evaluation criteria, contracting constraints)?
Delivery_Governance.why_it_matters: Aligns solution scope with commercial viability.
Delivery_Governance.risk_if_unanswered: Rework or disqualification due to misaligned commercials.

Delivery_Governance.question: Preferred rollout approach (pilot site(s) then phased rollout vs big bang) and success criteria per phase.
Delivery_Governance.why_it_matters: Defines change risk and learning cycles.
Delivery_Governance.risk_if_unanswered: Overly risky go-live or prolonged rollout.

Delivery_Governance.question: Who are the executive sponsor, product owner, and key SMEs? How will governance be structured (steering cadence)?
Delivery_Governance.why_it_matters: Ensures decisions and unblockers are in place.

Delivery_Governance.question: Training and change management expectations (super-users, SOPs, on-site training, multilingual materials).
Testing strategy (UAT scope, performance and integration testing, test data), and acceptance criteria.
Support expectations (hours of coverage, SLAs, L1–L3 model, languages, escalation paths) and post-go-live hypercare.
What deliverables are required (design docs, training materials, runbooks) and documentation standards?
Delivery_Governance.why_it_matters: Sets clear outputs and quality expectations.

Commercial_Assumptions.question: What licensing model is preferred (per user, per site, per transaction) and approximate user counts by persona?
Desired contract term, renewal options, and price protection/escalators?
Payment terms and milestone structure (design, pilot, rollout, acceptance)?
Who procures hardware (scanners, printers, labels) and any preferred vendors?
Commercial_Assumptions.risk_if_unanswered: Go-live delays due to missing hardware.

Commercial_Assumptions.question: Are third-party tools/services expected (iPaaS, SMS, printer software) and who bears those costs?
Any requirement for a paid POC/pilot and success criteria for progressing to full rollout?
Commercial_Assumptions.why_it_matters: Shapes presales effort, scope, and timeline.
Commercial_Assumptions.risk_if_unanswered: Unclear expectations leading to scope creep.

Commercial_Assumptions.question: IP ownership for customizations/integrations and restrictions on reuse as accelerators?
Commercial_Assumptions.why_it_matters: Defines rights and limits future costs.

Commercial_Assumptions.question: Insurance, liability caps, warranties, and compliance attestations required from vendor?
Commercial_Assumptions.why_it_matters: Informs contracting readiness and risk pricing.

sales_ppt.deck_title: Construction-Ready, Mobile-First Inventory Management with Offline and ERP Integration
sales_ppt.executive_summary: Aziro proposes a cloud-native Inventory Management solution tailored for construction. It unifies real-time stock visibility across job sites and warehouses, streamlines procurement, and provides mobile-first barcode/QR scanning with robust offline capability. Prebuilt integration patterns connect to your ERP/accounting systems. Role-based access, audit trails, and enterprise-grade security underpin the platform. A phased roadmap and post-go-live support accelerate time-to-value while minimizing risk.
sales_ppt.proposed_solution_theme: Construction-ready, mobile-first inventory visibility across job sites and warehouses with offline barcode scanning, automated procurement, and seamless ERP/accounting integration—delivered securely in the cloud with a clear implementation roadmap and strong post-go-live support.
why_aziro: Proven construction workflow expertise across multi-site operations
Mobile-first architecture with hardened offline sync for remote job sites
Barcode/QR capabilities optimized for rugged devices and camera-based scanning
Integration accelerators and reusable connectors for leading ERPs/accounting systems
Security by design: RBAC, detailed audit logs, SSO/MFA, encryption at rest/in-transit
Outcome-driven delivery with phased rollouts, training, and hypercare
Analytics-ready data model enabling dashboards for usage, wastage, and forecasting
differentiators: Offline-first sync engine with conflict resolution tailored to field workflows
Configurable procurement automation (min/max, approvals, vendor lead times) tightly integrated with ERP
Construction-aware cost allocation (job, phase, cost code) and reservation logic
Device-agnostic scanning with support for GS1 parsing and on-site label printing
Scalable cloud architecture with elasticity for peak project periods
Comprehensive auditability: event-level trails, exportable to SIEM
Accelerated implementation using templates for items, transactions, and dashboards
recommended_agenda: Your current challenges and success criteria
Solution overview for multi-site construction inventory
Integration to ERP/accounting and data migration approach
Security model, scalability, and cloud architecture
Implementation roadmap, timeline, and change management
Relevant construction experience and case studies

slides.title: Aziro + [Customer]: Inventory Modernization for Construction
slides.purpose: Set context and establish meeting objectives.
key_bullets: Purpose: unify material visibility across job sites and warehouses
Outcome: faster, accurate decisions with mobile-first execution
Today’s focus: solution fit, integrations, roadmap, value
slides.speaker_notes: Welcome, align on objectives, confirm time and agenda. Acknowledge construction job site realities—connectivity and pace.

slides.title: Your Challenge and Desired Outcomes
slides.purpose: Reframe the business problem and target outcomes.
key_bullets: Fragmented tracking limits real-time stock visibility
Manual procurement slows builds and increases costs
Need mobile updates, barcode/QR accuracy, and offline capability
Dashboards for usage, wastage, and forecasting to drive action
slides.speaker_notes: Validate the pain points and success metrics; invite customer to add specifics about sites, users, and KPIs.

slides.title: Solution Overview: Construction Inventory Across Sites/Warehouses
slides.purpose: Introduce the end-to-end solution scope aligned to construction operations.
key_bullets: Unified item master and stock visibility by site/warehouse/bin
Job/cost code issues with reservation and staging
Mobile-first operations with offline sync
Embedded procurement and supplier workflows
slides.speaker_notes: Highlight how the solution centralizes control yet works in rugged site conditions with intermittent connectivity.

slides.title: Real-Time Visibility and Tracking Approach
slides.purpose: Explain mechanics of real-time stock updates and location accuracy.
key_bullets: Event-driven updates from mobile and warehouse devices
In-transit, reserved, and available stock states
Geo/site segmentation with role-based views
Cycle counts and variance handling
slides.speaker_notes: Cover how the system prevents double-issuing and shows true availability including reservations and transfers.

slides.title: Mobile + Barcode/QR Scanning (Including Offline Mode)
slides.purpose: Demonstrate field-ready scanning and offline-first UX.
key_bullets: Supports camera and rugged scanners; GS1 parsing
One-hand flows with large controls for site conditions
Offline queue with conflict resolution and retry logic
On-site label printing from mobile
slides.speaker_notes: Stress scanning speed, sunlight readability, and handling of duplicates or damaged barcodes. Show offline transaction queue.

slides.title: Procurement Workflow Automation
slides.purpose: Show how replenishment and purchasing are automated and controlled.
key_bullets: Min/max and forecast-driven reorder proposals
Approval routing by thresholds and budget
Requisition-to-PO integration with ERP
Three-way match and exceptions handling
slides.speaker_notes: Connect procurement automation to reduction in stockouts and expedited buys. Emphasize configurability per site or job.

slides.title: Supplier Management
slides.purpose: Explain supplier data, performance, and collaboration.
key_bullets: Onboarding, compliance docs, and vendor catalogs
Lead times/MOQs, pricing, and contract terms
Scorecards: OTIF, quality, responsiveness
Supplier portal/API options
slides.speaker_notes: Focus on driving reliable supply and visibility into performance trends that affect project timelines.

slides.title: Dashboards and Reporting: Usage, Wastage, Forecasting
slides.purpose: Reveal analytics that guide decisions for PMs and executives.
key_bullets: Role-based dashboards for site, procurement, finance
Usage vs plan, wastage by reason/job, stockout risk
Forecast accuracy and supplier performance
Export to Excel/BI and scheduled reports
slides.speaker_notes: Tie KPIs to actionable workflows (e.g., trigger cycle counts, replenishment).

slides.title: Integration with ERP and Accounting
slides.purpose: Outline integration design for masters and transactions.
key_bullets: Bi-directional sync: items, suppliers, POs, receipts
GL posting alignment via cost codes and jobs
Patterns: REST APIs/iPaaS/SFTP as needed
Monitoring, retries, and error handling
slides.speaker_notes: Confirm ERP/accounting platforms; describe data contracts and latency targets for near real-time visibility.

slides.title: Security Model: RBAC, Audit Trails, Cloud Security
slides.purpose: Demonstrate enterprise-grade security aligned to policy.
key_bullets: Granular roles by persona/site with SoD
Immutable audit logs exportable to SIEM
SSO/MFA; encryption in transit/at rest
Backups, DR, and vulnerability management
slides.speaker_notes: Map requirements to frameworks (SOC 2/ISO 27001) and highlight audit readiness.

slides.title: Scalability and Cloud Architecture
slides.purpose: Show how the platform scales and remains resilient.
key_bullets: Cloud-native, autoscaling services
Multi-tenant or single-tenant options
Global regions and latency optimization
High availability with defined RTO/RPO
slides.speaker_notes: Discuss expected peak loads during project phases and how the architecture absorbs spikes.

slides.title: Implementation Roadmap and Timeline
slides.purpose: Present phased plan reducing risk and accelerating value.
key_bullets: Phase 1: pilot sites, core inventory + scanning
Phase 2: procurement automation + supplier
Phase 3: analytics, forecasting enhancements
Change management and training milestones
slides.speaker_notes: Invite validation of pilot candidates and critical dates; emphasize iterative learning and adoption.

slides.title: Post-Deployment Support and SLAs
slides.purpose: Reassure on ongoing operations and performance.
key_bullets: L1–L3 support model with defined SLAs
Proactive monitoring and incident response
Release cadence and feature roadmap input
Hypercare for first 4–8 weeks
slides.speaker_notes: Agree on coverage hours, languages, and escalation paths.

slides.title: Relevant Construction Experience
slides.purpose: Build credibility with domain-aligned case stories.
key_bullets: Multi-site inventory rollout reducing stockouts
Offline scanning at remote sites with >99.5% sync success
ERP integrations accelerating close by 2 days/month
Wastage reduction via reason codes and dashboards
slides.speaker_notes: Tailor with anonymized examples; focus on measurable outcomes and lessons learned.

slides.title: Use Case: Job Site Receiving with Offline Scanning
slides.purpose: Illustrate field workflow value during poor connectivity.
key_bullets: Scan delivery dockets and items; capture photos
Auto-validate against PO; flag variances
Queue transactions offline; sync on reconnect
Instant visibility for PMs and finance
slides.speaker_notes: Emphasize fewer disputes and faster GRN processing; link to reduced delays.

slides.title: Use Case: Automated Replenishment to Jobs
slides.purpose: Show proactive inventory planning and procurement.
key_bullets: Min/max and forecast proposals per site/job
Approval routing with budget checks
PO creation and supplier lead-time alignment
Prevent stockouts and urgent buys
slides.speaker_notes: Quantify savings from fewer expedites and better supplier coordination.

slides.title: Value and Benefits Summary
slides.purpose: Quantify impact and align on expected ROI.
key_bullets: Reduce wastage by 10–20% via reason tracking
Cut stockouts by 30–50% with proactive replenishment
Improve receiving throughput by 25–40% with scanning
Shorten month-end reconciliation by 1–2 days
slides.speaker_notes: Position these as benchmarks; confirm customer’s baseline to refine targets.

slides.title: Why Aziro
slides.purpose: Differentiate Aziro’s capabilities and approach.
key_bullets: Construction workflow depth and references
Offline-first mobile and GS1-ready scanning
ERP connectors and proven integration patterns
Security by design, audit-ready
slides.speaker_notes: Summarize key differentiators and risk mitigation from experience.

slides.title: Commercials and Assumptions
slides.purpose: Set transparent baseline for sizing and pricing.
key_bullets: Licensing model options (user/site/transaction)
Scope inclusions: config, integrations, migration, training
Hardware and third-party costs handled separately
POC/pilot pathway and acceptance criteria
slides.speaker_notes: Invite procurement discussion; align on assumptions before formal quote.

slides.title: Next Steps
slides.purpose: Gain agreement on the evaluation plan and timeline.
key_bullets: Discovery workshops to finalize scope and integrations
Pilot site selection and success metrics
Data migration assessment and cutover plan
Target dates for proposal, demo, and kickoff
slides.speaker_notes: Confirm owners and dates. Offer to share a detailed discovery checklist immediately.

use_cases.title: Job Site Receiving with Offline Barcode Scanning
use_cases.customer_problem: Deliveries arrive at remote sites with limited connectivity, causing delays in recording receipts, mismatches with POs, and disputes over quantities/conditions.
use_cases.aziro_solution: Mobile app enables barcode/QR scanning against POs, photo capture for damages, and offline queuing. On reconnect, transactions sync to the cloud and ERP with variance alerts.
use_cases.business_value: Accelerates goods receipt, reduces disputes and write-offs, and provides immediate visibility to PMs and finance; improves supplier accountability.
use_cases.why_relevant_here: Directly addresses the need for mobile updates, barcode accuracy, auditability, and offline-first operation at job sites.

use_cases.title: Automated Replenishment and Procurement
use_cases.customer_problem: Reactive purchasing leads to stockouts and costly expedite orders; PMs lack forward visibility into material needs by job and phase.
use_cases.aziro_solution: Configurable min/max and forecast-driven proposals per site/job with approval workflows. Generates requisitions/POs and syncs to ERP; tracks supplier lead times and performance.
use_cases.business_value: Fewer stockouts and expedites, optimized inventory levels, improved schedule adherence, and reduced carrying costs.
use_cases.why_relevant_here: Aligns with desired procurement automation, supplier management, and forecasting dashboards integrated with ERP/accounting.

must_include_slides_alignment: Solution overview for construction inventory across job sites/warehouses
Real-time inventory visibility and tracking approach
Mobile + barcode/QR scanning capabilities (including offline mode)
Integration approach with ERP and accounting systems
Security model (RBAC, audit trails, cloud security)
Post-deployment support model and SLAs (if applicable)
